notes: YMCA of Greater New York Long Island City branch birthday-party page and branch listing. Hero image is the official YMCA-hosted pool banner JPEG referenced from the birthday page markup, downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.

document.name: Long Island City YMCA — Birthday Parties
document.address: 32-23 Queens Boulevard, Long Island City, NY 11101
document.shortDescription: YMCA pool and party-room birthday packages in LIC: published pool times, capacity limits, and optional multipurpose room add-ons with member and non-member pricing.
document.longDescription:
The Long Island City YMCA of Greater New York advertises child birthday party packages that include pool parties with a certified lifeguard and optional use of a multipurpose party room. The official birthday-party page states that pool parties include exclusive pool use for the booked duration, with noodles, bubbles/backpacks, and toys available, and a published capacity of up to 25 swimmers including adults supervising in the water, with a note to confirm required adult-to-child ratios with the branch.

Scheduling details on the same page: pool parties are offered on Saturdays at 4:30 p.m., with optional room rental afterward until 8 p.m.; party room rentals alone are described as Sundays between 10 a.m. and 4:30 p.m. The Y does not provide decorations, supplies, or food for the party room; families may bring their own. Swim caps are sold at the front desk ($12–$16 each per the page), and guests are reminded to bring flip-flops, appropriate swim attire (no cotton), and towels/locks.

Published package pricing (member / non-member) on that page includes, for example, 60-minute pool without swim instructor at $450 / $500, 90-minute pool without instructor at $500 / $575, and higher tiers with swim instructors or longer room blocks as listed in the table. Additional surcharges apply for groups beyond 25 or 50 swimmers, and parking add-ons for up to 20 cars are listed separately.

For more information the page directs families to contact William Tsuda, Aquatics Director, at wtsuda@ymcanyc.org. The branch location listing confirms the street address and lists branch phone 718-392-7932.

Sources: https://ymcanyc.org/locations/long-island-city-ymca/long-island-city-birthday-parties https://ymcanyc.org/locations/long-island-city-ymca https://ymcanyc.org/locations
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists pool parties on Saturdays at 4:30 p.m., with optional room rental after—confirm current availability when booking.
